g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'date' for a time scale with values from Monday, 01 January 2024, 12:00:00 AM to Tuesday, 31 December 2024, 12:00:00 AM
Y-axis titled 'value' for a linear scale with values from 95,904 to 126,288
Symbol legend titled 'series' for stroke color with 9 values: AUDUSD, EURUSD, GBPUSD, JPYUSD, NZDUSD, ending with USDSEK
